articles.title: Middlesex appoint Harrington as interim CEO
articles.description: Middlesex announce the appointment of Julie Harrington as the club's interim chief executive officer.
articles.content:
Middlesex have announced the appointment of Julie Harrington as the county's interim chief executive officer.

articles.author: The Times Of India
articles.title: MSMEs are 2nd backbone of India’s economic growth: Manijhi
articles.description: MSME minister Jitan Ram Manjhi says MSMEs are India’s second economic backbone after agriculture, contribute 31.1% to GDP, and get collateral-free loans.
